name: Compare Stocks
description: Compare performance of multiple stocks side-by-side over a date range — percent change, volatility, highs/lows.
exampleQuery: Compare AAPL, MSFT, and GOOGL from 01/01/2025 to today

sampleResponse.summary: Side-by-side comparison of AAPL, MSFT, and GOOGL in 2025.
insights: AAPL outperformed MSFT by 2 percentage points in this period.
